property.name: contextChild
property.label: Context Child
property.description: The specific context of the chat i.e. a case, opportunity, asset

property.name: contextParent
property.label: Context Parent
property.description: The general context of the chat i.e. Account

property.name: flowApiName
property.label: Flow for Chat Escalation Api Name

property.name: flowMessageInputVariableName
property.label: Chat Escalation Flow Message Input Variable Api Name
property.description: LWC outputs a String to the Flow, provide the api name of the input variable you want the LWC to populate

property.name: flowEscalationRecordOutputApiName
property.label: Chat Escalation Flow Record Output Variable Api Name

property.name: flowContextParentInputApiName
property.label: Chat Escalation Flow Context Parent Input Variable Api Name

property.name: maxHeight
property.label: the maximum height of the chat message section of the chat component

property.name: anchorTarget
property.label: Specifies how where links in the chat window open, options _self, _blank, etc. Defaults to _self. https://www.w3schools.com/tags/att_a_target.asp, in serivce console leaving as _self will open in a new console tab
